mapper.sql: SELECT B.BOARD_NO , B.BOARD_TITLE , C.CATEGORY_NAME , B.COUNT , M.MEMBER_NAME , B.CREATE_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS COMMENT_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT , (SELECT IMG_PATH || SAVE_NAME FROM MEMBER_IMG WHERE MEMBER_NO = B.MEMBER_NO AND DEL_YN = 'N') AS PROFILE_IMAGE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY C ON B.CATEGORY_NO = C.CATEGORY_NO JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE B.DEL_YN = 'N'

AND (
M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
( M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' )
)
mapper.select: ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.BOARD_NO , B.BOARD_TITLE , B.BOARD_CONTENT , B.COUNT , C.CATEGORY_NAME , M.MEMBER_ID , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS COMMENT_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_DISLIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS DISLIKE_COUNT
FROM BOARD B JOIN Category C USING(CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT BOARD_NO FROM BOARD WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE B.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_DISLIKE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
